# Moderation Log

This file is append-only. Every moderation action Quorum takes is 
recorded here with the exact git commit hash of the RULES.md version 
that was active at the time of the ruling.

To verify any ruling, run: `git show <commit>`

---

## Log Format

| Timestamp | User ID | Channel | Action | Rule | Reason | Rules Commit |
|-----------|---------|---------|--------|------|--------|--------------|

---
